roles.rationale: The causal identity must include the exact evidence set.

observations.title: Causal identity omits the evidence manifest
observations.recommendation: Include a deterministic digest of the full evidence manifest in causal_basis.

roles.rationale: Commit timestamps are issuer-controlled and do not prove when the PR head became observable.

observations.title: valid_time uses commit metadata instead of trusted head observation
observations.recommendation: Record a GitHub-observed head timestamp and preserve commit time only as source metadata.

roles.rationale: Narrative fields can be changed and rehashed without being re-derived.

observations.title: decision.why is not derived by the semantic seal
observations.recommendation: Derive or independently validate decision.why from the verdict and evidence state.

roles.rationale: The panel and envelope remain advisory and cannot execute, approve, or merge.
The current provider comment is updated in place, but the upstream gate uses created_at only.

observations.title: Reused provider quota comments are filtered by created_at only
observations.recommendation: Use updated_at for provider evidence while keeping trusted requests bound to created_at and current-head text.

root_causes.title: Causal identity omits the evidence manifest
valid_time uses commit metadata instead of trusted head observation
Reused provider quota comments are filtered by created_at only
decision.why is not derived by the semantic seal

dissent.reason: The current provider comment is updated in place, but the upstream gate uses created_at only.

transition.tension: External review stalled; role-separated panel found unique causes.
transition.smallest_justified_action: Fix the four unique P2 causes, create a new exact head, and rerun both the panel and external lane.
